name: arrstack
description: Configurable MCP server exposing homelab media and game services (Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr, qBittorrent, RDTClient, SABnzbd, Jellyfin, RomM, GameVault, Bookshelf) as tools for AI assistants to search, add, and manage media and game libraries.
instructions:
Homelab media stack tools for Sonarr (TV), Radarr (Movies), Lidarr (Music), Prowlarr (Indexers), qBittorrent, RDTClient and SABnzbd (Downloads), Jellyfin (Streaming), RomM (ROM library), and GameVault (PC game library). Use these tools to search, add, and manage media and game libraries.

## Hungarian (HuN) / nCore workflow
nCore is a Hungarian private tracker with dual-audio (HuN) releases. When the user wants Hungarian releases:
1. Make sure movies/series are on the correct Hungarian quality profile (use radarr_list_movies / sonarr_list_series — they show profile names and IDs).
2. IMPORTANT: Dual-audio releases are 2–3× larger than English-only at the same quality tier because they carry two full audio tracks. The default 1080p max size (~83 MB/min) is too low — raise Bluray-1080p, Remux-1080p, WEBDL-1080p, WEBRip-1080p, and HDTV-1080p max to at least 400 MB/min with radarr_set_quality_definition / sonarr_set_quality_definition.
3. After triggering a search, always check the queue to verify releases contain 'HuN' or 'HUN' in the filename. If Radarr/Sonarr grabbed an English-only release, delete it from the queue (blocklist=true) and re-search.
4. If existing files need replacing (e.g. English → HuN), delete the movie file with radarr_delete_movie_file / sonarr_delete_episode_file first, then search.

tools.name: bookshelf_get_author
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific author by their Bookshelf ID.

tools.name: bookshelf_health
tools.description: Check Bookshelf health: returns app version, build, and any active health issues.

tools.name: bookshelf_list_authors
tools.description: List all authors in Bookshelf with monitoring status, book counts, and disk usage.

tools.name: bookshelf_list_books
tools.description: List all books currently tracked in Bookshelf (title, author, monitored, page count).

tools.name: bookshelf_list_metadata_profiles
tools.description: List all metadata profiles in Bookshelf (controls which release types/secondary types are tracked).

tools.name: bookshelf_list_quality_profiles
tools.description: List all quality profiles configured in Bookshelf with their allowed qualities.

tools.name: bookshelf_list_root_folders
tools.description: List all configured root folders in Bookshelf with free space.

tools.name: bookshelf_queue
tools.description: Show the current Bookshelf download queue with status and queue IDs.

tools.name: bookshelf_search_author
tools.description: Search Bookshelf's metadata source (Hardcover) for an author. Returns name and Hardcover ID.

tools.name: bookshelf_search_book
tools.description: Search Bookshelf's metadata source (Hardcover) for a book. Returns title, author, and IDs.

tools.name: bookshelf_search_missing
tools.description: Trigger Bookshelf to search for all missing monitored books.

tools.name: bookshelf_wanted_missing
tools.description: List books Bookshelf has flagged as missing (monitored but no file). Paged; default 20.

tools.name: gamevault_get_game
tools.description: Get details for a GameVault game by its internal ID.

tools.name: gamevault_list_games
tools.description:
List or search PC games and installers indexed by GameVault.

Args:
    search: Optional game-title search term.
    page: Results page (default: 1).
    limit: Number of games to return (default: 25, max: 100).

tools.name: gamevault_random_game
tools.description: Pick a random game from GameVault.

tools.name: gamevault_reindex
tools.description: Tell GameVault to scan its game-files directory for new or changed installers.

tools.name: jellyfin_libraries
tools.description: List all Jellyfin media libraries with their types and paths.

tools.name: jellyfin_recent
tools.description:
Show recently added items in Jellyfin.

Args:
    limit: Number of items to return (default: 10, max: 50).

tools.name: jellyfin_scan_library
tools.description:
Trigger a library scan in Jellyfin to detect new, changed, or removed media files.
Requires JELLYFIN_API_KEY to be set.

tools.name: jellyfin_system_info
tools.description: Get Jellyfin server system information (version, OS, etc.).

tools.name: lidarr_add_artist
tools.description:
Add an artist to Lidarr by name. Use lidarr_search to find the artist first.

Args:
    artist_name: Artist name to look up and add.
    quality_profile_id: Quality profile (use lidarr_list_quality_profiles).
    metadata_profile_id: Metadata profile (use lidarr_list_metadata_profiles).
    root_folder_path: Root folder path (use lidarr_list_root_folders).
    monitored: Whether to monitor the artist (default: True).

tools.name: lidarr_delete_queue_item
tools.description:
Remove an item from the Lidarr download queue.

Args:
    queue_id: Queue item ID (use lidarr_queue to find it).
    blocklist: If True, adds the release to the blocklist so it won't be grabbed again.

tools.name: lidarr_get_artist
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific artist by their Lidarr ID.

tools.name: lidarr_list_artists
tools.description: List all artists in Lidarr with monitoring status, album counts, and disk usage.

tools.name: lidarr_list_metadata_profiles
tools.description: List all metadata profiles in Lidarr (controls which release types/secondary types are tracked).

tools.name: lidarr_list_quality_profiles
tools.description: List all quality profiles in Lidarr with their allowed qualities.

tools.name: lidarr_list_root_folders
tools.description: List all configured root folders in Lidarr with free space.

tools.name: lidarr_queue
tools.description: Show the current Lidarr download queue with status and queue IDs for each item.

tools.name: lidarr_search
tools.description: Search for an artist to add to Lidarr. Returns artist name and MusicBrainz ID.

tools.name: lidarr_search_album
tools.description: Search for an album in Lidarr's metadata source. Returns album title, artist, and MusicBrainz ID.

tools.name: lidarr_search_missing
tools.description: Trigger a search for all missing albums in Lidarr.

tools.name: prowlarr_grab
tools.description:
Grab a release from the most recent prowlarr_search results and send it to the download client (qBittorrent).

Run prowlarr_search first, then use the [index] number from those results here.

Args:
    index: The result number from prowlarr_search (e.g. 0 for the first result).

tools.name: prowlarr_health
tools.description: Check Prowlarr system health for warnings and errors.

tools.name: prowlarr_list_indexers
tools.description: List all configured indexers in Prowlarr with their status and priority.

tools.name: prowlarr_search
tools.description:
Search across Prowlarr indexers for releases.

Returns numbered results with guid for use with prowlarr_grab.

Args:
    query: Search term.
    indexer_ids: Comma-separated indexer IDs to search (empty = all).

tools.name: prowlarr_test_all_indexers
tools.description: Test all enabled indexers in Prowlarr and report their status.

tools.name: prowlarr_test_indexer
tools.description:
Test an indexer connection in Prowlarr. Use this to reset a failing indexer.

Args:
    indexer_id: The indexer ID (use prowlarr_list_indexers to find it).

tools.name: qbt_add
tools.description:
Add anything to qBittorrent and start downloading immediately.

This is the one-shot "just download it" tool. Hand it a `source` and it
auto-detects what it is:
  • a magnet link (magnet:?xt=urn:btih:...)
  • an http(s):// URL pointing to a .torrent file
  • a path to a local .torrent file on the server
  • base64-encoded .torrent file contents (optionally a data: URI)

Args:
    source: A magnet link, .torrent URL, local .torrent path, or base64 torrent data.
    category: Optional qBittorrent category to assign (e.g. "tv", "movies").
    save_path: Optional download directory; defaults to the category/global path.
    paused: If True, add the torrent without starting it.

tools.name: qbt_add_magnet
tools.description:
Add a magnet link to qBittorrent.

For .torrent files or URLs, use qbt_add_torrent_file (or qbt_add, which
accepts any source).

Args:
    magnet_url: The magnet URI to add (must start with "magnet:").
    category: Optional category to assign (e.g. "tv", "movies").
    save_path: Optional download directory; defaults to the category/global path.
    paused: If True, add the torrent without starting it.

tools.name: qbt_add_torrent_file
tools.description:
Add a .torrent file to qBittorrent.

`source` may be a local file path on the server, an http(s):// URL to a
.torrent file (downloaded and uploaded for you), or base64-encoded .torrent
contents. For magnet links use qbt_add_magnet (or qbt_add for anything).

Args:
    source: Local .torrent path, .torrent URL, or base64 torrent data.
    category: Optional category to assign (e.g. "tv", "movies").
    save_path: Optional download directory; defaults to the category/global path.
    paused: If True, add the torrent without starting it.

tools.name: qbt_delete
tools.description:
Delete a torrent from qBittorrent.

Args:
    torrent_hash: Hash of the torrent to delete.
    delete_files: If True, also delete downloaded files from disk.

tools.name: qbt_list_torrents
tools.description:
List torrents in qBittorrent.

Args:
    filter: Filter torrents — "all", "downloading", "seeding", "completed", "paused", "active", "stalled".

tools.name: qbt_pause
tools.description:
Pause a torrent. Use 'all' to pause everything.

Args:
    torrent_hash: Hash of the torrent, or "all" to pause all.

tools.name: qbt_resume
tools.description:
Resume a torrent. Use 'all' to resume everything.

Args:
    torrent_hash: Hash of the torrent, or "all" to resume all.

tools.name: qbt_torrent_details
tools.description:
Get detailed info about a specific torrent by its hash.

Args:
    torrent_hash: The info hash of the torrent.

tools.name: qbt_transfer_info
tools.description: Get global qBittorrent transfer statistics (speeds, totals, connection status).

tools.name: radarr_add_movie
tools.description:
Add a movie to Radarr by its TMDB ID. Use radarr_search to find the TMDB ID first.

Args:
    tmdb_id: The TMDB ID of the movie.
    quality_profile_id: Quality profile to use (default: 1).

tools.name: radarr_delete_movie_file
tools.description:
Delete the downloaded file for a movie, marking it as missing in Radarr.
This allows Radarr to re-search and download a new version.

Args:
    movie_id: Radarr movie ID (use radarr_list_movies or radarr_get_movie to find it).

tools.name: radarr_delete_queue_item
tools.description:
Remove an item from the Radarr download queue.

Args:
    queue_id: Queue item ID (use radarr_queue to find it).
    blocklist: If True, adds the release to the blocklist so it won't be grabbed again.

tools.name: radarr_get_movie
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific movie by its Radarr ID.

tools.name: radarr_get_quality_definitions
tools.description:
Get quality size limits (min/max MB per minute) for each quality tier in Radarr.
These limits control what file sizes Radarr will accept for downloads.

tools.name: radarr_list_custom_formats
tools.description: List all custom formats in Radarr with their specifications.

tools.name: radarr_list_movies
tools.description: List all movies in Radarr with download status and disk usage.

tools.name: radarr_list_quality_profiles
tools.description: List all quality profiles in Radarr with their allowed qualities.

tools.name: radarr_queue
tools.description: Show the current Radarr download queue with status and queue IDs for each item.

tools.name: radarr_search
tools.description: Search for a movie to add to Radarr. Returns title, year, TMDB ID, and overview.

tools.name: radarr_search_missing
tools.description:
Trigger a search for missing movies in Radarr.

Args:
    movie_ids: Comma-separated Radarr movie IDs to search. Leave empty to search ALL missing movies.

tools.name: radarr_set_quality_definition
tools.description:
Set the min/preferred/max file size (in MB per minute of runtime) for a Radarr quality tier.

Use radarr_get_quality_definitions to see current values and quality IDs.
For a ~2hr movie, 40 MB/min ≈ 5 GB, 85 MB/min ≈ 10 GB.
Set to 0 for unlimited (max/preferred only). Pass -1 to leave unchanged.

Args:
    quality_id: Quality ID from radarr_get_quality_definitions.
    min_size: Minimum MB per minute (-1 to keep current).
    preferred_size: Preferred MB per minute (-1 to keep current, 0 for unlimited).
    max_size: Maximum MB per minute (-1 to keep current, 0 for unlimited).

tools.name: radarr_update_movie
tools.description:
Update settings for a movie in Radarr (quality profile, monitored status, etc.).

Args:
    movie_id: Radarr movie ID (use radarr_list_movies or radarr_get_movie to find it).
    quality_profile_id: New quality profile ID (-1 to keep current).
    monitored: Set to 1 to monitor, 0 to unmonitor (-1 to keep current).

tools.name: rdt_add_magnet
tools.description:
Add a magnet link to RDTClient (which sends it to your debrid provider).

Args:
    magnet: The magnet URI to add.
    category: Optional category to assign (e.g. "tv", "movies").

tools.name: rdt_delete
tools.description:
Delete one or more RDTClient torrents. Pipe-separate hashes, or use 'all'.

Args:
    torrent_hashes: Hash, "hash1|hash2", or "all".
    delete_files: If True, also delete downloaded files from disk.

tools.name: rdt_list_torrents
tools.description:
List torrents in RDTClient.

Args:
    filter: Filter — "all", "downloading", "seeding", "completed", "paused", "active", "stalled".

tools.name: rdt_pause
tools.description:
Pause one or more RDTClient torrents. Pipe-separate hashes, or use 'all'.

Args:
    torrent_hashes: Hash, "hash1|hash2", or "all".

tools.name: rdt_provider_status
tools.description:
Show Real-Debrid / AllDebrid / Premiumize provider status from RDTClient.

Reads from RDTClient's native /api/Settings endpoint to surface the configured
debrid provider. Requires the same auth as the qBT-compat API; if your
RDTClient install requires login, set RDT_USER/RDT_PASS.

tools.name: rdt_resume
tools.description:
Resume one or more RDTClient torrents. Pipe-separate hashes, or use 'all'.

Args:
    torrent_hashes: Hash, "hash1|hash2", or "all".

tools.name: rdt_torrent_details
tools.description:
Get detailed info about a specific RDTClient torrent by its hash.

Args:
    torrent_hash: The info hash of the torrent.

tools.name: romm_get_game
tools.description: Get details for a RomM game by its internal ID.

tools.name: romm_list_games
tools.description:
List or search games already indexed in RomM.

Args:
    search: Optional game-title search term.
    platform_id: Optional RomM platform ID from romm_list_platforms.
    limit: Number of games to return (default: 25, max: 100).

tools.name: romm_list_platforms
tools.description: List RomM platforms with their IDs, ROM counts, and library sizes.

tools.name: romm_system_info
tools.description: Show the RomM version, detected library platforms, and enabled metadata sources.

tools.name: sab_add_url
tools.description:
Add an NZB by URL to SABnzbd.

Args:
    nzb_url: URL pointing at an NZB file.
    category: Optional SAB category (default: empty = default category).
    priority: SABnzbd priority (-100 = default, -2..2 supported).

tools.name: sab_delete_job
tools.description:
Delete a job from the SABnzbd queue.

Args:
    nzo_id: The NZO id of the queue item.
    delete_files: If True, also delete any files already downloaded.

tools.name: sab_history
tools.description: Show SABnzbd download history.

tools.name: sab_pause
tools.description: Pause the entire SABnzbd queue.

tools.name: sab_pause_job
tools.description:
Pause a specific SABnzbd queue item.

Args:
    nzo_id: The NZO id of the queue item (use sab_queue to find it).

tools.name: sab_queue
tools.description: Show the current SABnzbd download queue.

tools.name: sab_resume
tools.description: Resume the entire SABnzbd queue.

tools.name: sab_resume_job
tools.description:
Resume a specific SABnzbd queue item.

Args:
    nzo_id: The NZO id of the queue item.

tools.name: sab_speed_limit
tools.description:
Set the SABnzbd global speed limit as a percentage of the configured max.

Args:
    percent: Speed-limit percentage, 0..100 (0 = pause-by-throttle, 100 = full speed).

tools.name: sab_status
tools.description: Show SABnzbd full status (server, disk space, speed, etc.).

tools.name: sonarr_add_series
tools.description:
Add a TV series to Sonarr by its TVDB ID. Use sonarr_search to find the TVDB ID first.

Args:
    tvdb_id: The TVDB ID of the series.
    quality_profile_id: Quality profile to use (default: 1).
    monitor: Episodes to monitor — "all", "future", "missing", "pilot", "none".

tools.name: sonarr_delete_episode_file
tools.description:
Delete a downloaded episode file, marking it as missing in Sonarr.
This allows Sonarr to re-search and download a new version.

Args:
    episode_file_id: Episode file ID (use sonarr_get_series to find file IDs).

tools.name: sonarr_delete_queue_item
tools.description:
Remove an item from the Sonarr download queue.

Args:
    queue_id: Queue item ID (use sonarr_queue to find it).
    blocklist: If True, adds the release to the blocklist so it won't be grabbed again.

tools.name: sonarr_get_quality_definitions
tools.description:
Get quality size limits (min/max MB per minute) for each quality tier in Sonarr.
These limits control what file sizes Sonarr will accept for downloads.

tools.name: sonarr_get_series
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific TV series by its Sonarr ID.

tools.name: sonarr_list_custom_formats
tools.description: List all custom formats in Sonarr with their specifications.

tools.name: sonarr_list_quality_profiles
tools.description: List all quality profiles in Sonarr with their allowed qualities.

tools.name: sonarr_list_series
tools.description: List all TV series in Sonarr with monitoring status, episode counts, and disk usage.

tools.name: sonarr_queue
tools.description: Show the current Sonarr download queue with status and queue IDs for each item.

tools.name: sonarr_search
tools.description: Search for a TV series to add to Sonarr. Returns title, year, TVDB ID, and overview.

tools.name: sonarr_search_missing
tools.description:
Trigger a search for missing episodes in Sonarr.

Args:
    series_id: Sonarr series ID to search. Set to 0 to search ALL series with missing episodes.

tools.name: sonarr_set_quality_definition
tools.description:
Set the min/preferred/max file size (in MB per minute of runtime) for a Sonarr quality tier.

Use sonarr_get_quality_definitions to see current values and quality IDs.
For a ~45min episode, 5 MB/min ≈ 225 MB, 10 MB/min ≈ 450 MB.
Set to 0 for unlimited (max/preferred only). Pass -1 to leave unchanged.

Args:
    quality_id: Quality ID from sonarr_get_quality_definitions.
    min_size: Minimum MB per minute (-1 to keep current).
    preferred_size: Preferred MB per minute (-1 to keep current, 0 for unlimited).
    max_size: Maximum MB per minute (-1 to keep current, 0 for unlimited).

tools.name: sonarr_upcoming
tools.description:
Show upcoming TV episodes within the next N days.

Args:
    days: Number of days to look ahead (default: 7).

tools.name: sonarr_update_series
tools.description:
Update settings for a series in Sonarr (quality profile, monitored status, etc.).

Args:
    series_id: Sonarr series ID (use sonarr_list_series or sonarr_get_series to find it).
    quality_profile_id: New quality profile ID (-1 to keep current).
    monitored: Set to 1 to monitor, 0 to unmonitor (-1 to keep current).
